Conflict can intensify into strife, characterized by bitter discord.
Strife often spirals into turmoil, denoting a state of profound instability.
Turmoil may lead to disorder, signifying a breakdown of structured order.
Disorder can devolve into anarchy, where traditional rules and systems collapse.
Anarchy typically results in chaos, representing complete confusion and lack of control.
